raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a charge of {$7400.00} was posted to my Barclays Bank Delaware credit card from XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I did not authorize this transaction, nor did I create an account, participate in an auction, or purchase anything from this company. 

Although the merchant may have used my personal information ( name, phone number, and address ), I never approved this transaction. This suggests that my information was used without my consent possibly due to identity theft. 

I immediately contacted Barclays, and a case was opened ( Case # XXXX ). However, they declined to reverse the charge because the merchant had my identifying information, despite the fact that I never authorized the purchase or received any goods. 

I also contacted XXXX. XXXX XXXX by text asking for transaction details and a refund, but received no resolution. Ive since filed a complaint with the XXXX  Attorney General ( XXXX # XXXX ) and am now filing this complaint with the CFPB because my dispute remains unresolved. 

I am seeking a full refund of the {$7400.00} charged without my authorization.
